content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

January 21, 2003

Gary McGeorge
Post Office Box 852
Angels Camp, CA 95222

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No.: W-03-009

Dear Mr. McGeorge:

This letter is in response to your request for written advice on Government Code § 1090 and its application to your potential conflict of interest. Under the provisions of regulation 18329(b)(8)(D), copy enclosed, we must decline your request for advice. Government Code § 1090 is outside the purview of the Fair Political Practices Commission - we advise on laws only pertaining to the Political Reform Act.¹ Please direct your inquiry to the Office of the Attorney General.

Should you need assistance in the future regarding provisions of the Act, please do not hesitate to submit your request to the Fair Political Practices Commission via facsimile or U.S. Mail.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel

Enclosure
JWW:jg

¹. Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
